case_title: CORNELL RICHMOND VS. GLORIA YOUNG et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUL-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, GLORIA DBA CLEAN IMAGE
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT HEARING SET FOR AUG-21-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF RICHMOND, CORNELL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUL-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, STUART DBA CLEAN IMAGE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $355.00 FILED BY RICHMOND, CORNELL AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, GLORIA DBA CLEAN IMAGE YOUNG, STUART DBA CLEAN IMAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY RICHMOND, CORNELL

COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO NAMED DEFENDANTS. PER COURT ORDER NAM KIM IS ADDED AS THE CORRECT DEFENDANT. NO ADDRESS WAS PROVIDED FOR NAM KIM, JUDGMENT WILL BE MAILED TO PARTIES WHO HAVE ADDRESSES IN ROA. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHMOND, CORNELL AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, GLORIA DBA CLEAN IMAGE YOUNG, STUART DBA CLEAN IMAGE CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-21-2008 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHMOND, CORNELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, NAM $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $190.00, (THE COURT AMENDS THE COMPLAINT TO NAME NAM KIM AS THE CORRECT DEFENDANT. ALL OTHER DEFENDANTS ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-21-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. NAM KIM APPEARS AS DEFENDANT IN CASE, STATES THAT HE PURCHASED BUSINESS CLEAN IMAGE FROM THE NAMED DEFENDANT GLORIA YOUNG. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
